tests.name: renders the DEV SERVER label
tests.criteria: Text 'DEV SERVER' is present in the DOM when import.meta.env.DEV is true

tests.name: renders the dev URL dev.syntheticarchetype.com
tests.criteria: Text 'dev.syntheticarchetype.com' is present in the DOM

tests.name: renders the branch name 'dev'
tests.criteria: Text matching /branch:\s*dev/i is present in the DOM

tests.name: renders when import.meta.env.DEV is true
tests.criteria: Component mounts and exposes an aria banner when DEV=true

tests.name: renders when VITE_SHOW_DEV_BANNER is 'true' even if DEV is false
tests.criteria: Component mounts when VITE_SHOW_DEV_BANNER='true' regardless of DEV flag

tests.name: returns null when DEV is false and VITE_SHOW_DEV_BANNER is not set
tests.criteria: container.firstChild is null — component renders nothing

tests.name: returns null when DEV is false and VITE_SHOW_DEV_BANNER is 'false'
tests.criteria: container.firstChild is null — explicit false flag suppresses render

tests.name: has fixed bottom positioning (pinned to bottom of viewport)
tests.criteria: Root element has Tailwind classes 'fixed' and 'bottom-0'

tests.name: is 28px tall via explicit height class or inline style
tests.criteria: Root element has class 'h-7' (28px Tailwind) OR inline style height:28px

dev-banner-integration.scope: DevBanner in WorkspaceShell and App render trees

tests.name: renders DevBanner inside the WorkspaceShell layout when DEV is true
tests.criteria: Mounting WorkspaceShell with DEV=true results in DEV SERVER text visible

tests.name: DevBanner is absent in WorkspaceShell when DEV is false
tests.criteria: Mounting WorkspaceShell with DEV=false results in no DEV SERVER text

tests.name: renders DevBanner on the homepage route when DEV is true
tests.criteria: Mounting App at '/' with DEV=true results in DEV SERVER text visible

tests.name: DevBanner is absent on homepage when DEV is false
tests.criteria: Mounting App at '/' with DEV=false results in no DEV SERVER text

tests.name: renders with the full expected text in one element or nearby siblings
tests.criteria: All three strings — DEV SERVER, dev.syntheticarchetype.com, branch: dev — present in DOM
